name: botnote
description: Notion for bots — capture + recall + project context for AI agents. Plugin bundles the botnote MCP server with /today, /remember, /recall, /start-work, /done slash commands and a curator subagent.

botnote_url.title: botnote daemon URL
botnote_url.description: tailnet/localhost: http://100.68.185.53:4280 or http://127.0.0.1:4280 (no token needed). Public: https://botnote.net (requires bearer + CF Access service token).

botnote_token.title: API bearer token
botnote_token.description: Required only when going through https://botnote.net. Mint via `botnote tokens create` on the daemon host.
